description: VERIFIED LIVE: 百度网盘 (Baidu Netdisk) via your logged-in pan.baidu.com session — no token (session bridge). List folders/files and check storage quota work cookie-only on the same-origin web API. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in account: /api/list (errno 0, 11 entries) and /api/quota both 200. (Read-only: uploads/moves need a bdstoken CSRF, not included.)

tools.name: baidupan_list
tools.description: List files/folders in a 百度网盘 directory. Returns list[] with server_filename, isdir (1=folder), size, fs_id, path, server_mtime. VERIFIED (11 entries at /).

params.name: dir
params.description: Directory path, e.g. / or /我的资源.

tools.name: baidupan_quota
tools.description: Your 百度网盘 storage quota (total/used in bytes). VERIFIED.
